title: The Beginning of Life
subtitle: Where everything quietly starts
description: In week 3, fertilization may occur, marking the true beginning of pregnancy. A fertilized egg (zygote) starts dividing and traveling toward the uterus for implantation.
what_to_expect: Fertilization may take place during this time
The zygote begins rapid cell division
The fertilized egg moves toward the uterus for implantation
care_tips: Continue maintaining a healthy and balanced diet
Avoid alcohol, smoking, and exposure to harmful substances
Ensure adequate rest and manage stress levels

medical_checkups.note: Pregnancy is usually not confirmed yet, but early awareness remains important.

commonly_suggested.name: Preconception Health Review
commonly_suggested.purpose: Ensures readiness and identifies any health concerns

medical_checkups.guidance: Further confirmation tests are typically done after implantation in the following weeks.

important_note: This is a crucial stage where the foundation of new life begins forming at a microscopic level.
reassurance: Even though you may not feel it yet, an important journey may have already begun within you.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider before making any medical or lifestyle changes.

diabetes.personalized_description: Stable blood sugar levels during this stage support healthy early cell development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar control may be reviewed to support early pregnancy health.
diabetes.reassurance: Keeping your levels stable can support a smoother start.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support early cellular growth and energy levels.
care_tips: Include iron-rich foods in daily meals
Pair iron sources with vitamin C
anemia.medical_focus: Iron levels may be assessed if needed during early evaluation.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your body now helps build strength for the coming weeks.

hypertension.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood pressure supports a healthy internal environment for early development.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure may be monitored as part of routine care.
hypertension.reassurance: Calm and consistent habits can support your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels are important for early hormonal and developmental processes.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be reviewed during early pregnancy confirmation.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps your body maintain balance during this phase.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: Managing multiple health conditions during this early stage requires consistency and awareness.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, steady efforts can support a healthy beginning.
